heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny or becoming so in the north. Clouds and showers south, mainly far south.
temperature: Lower 70s to mid 80s, south to north

heading: Tonight
text: Showers ending south, clearing north to south.

heading: Wednesday
temperature: Low to mid 80s, some upper 80s in the broad valleys west

heading: Thursday
text: Chance of an afternoon shower or storm north, mainly far north.
